All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
Admin
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Represents an administrator user in the TicketMiner system.
Arena
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Represents an Arena venue in the TicketMiner system.
Auditorium
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Represents an Auditorium venue in the TicketMiner system.
Concert
 
Customer
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Represents a Customer user in the TicketMiner system.
Event
 
EventManager
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Manages all events in the system using a HashMap.
Logger
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Handles logging messages to a log file with timestamps.
OpenAir
Creates a new Open Air venue.
Organizer
Creates a new Organizer.
RunTicketMiner
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner This class contains the main method that starts the TicketMiner system.
Special
Creates a new Special event.
Sport
Creates a new Sport event.
Stadium
Creates a new Stadium venue.
TicketMinerSystem
Name: Pablo Gonzalez, Sebastian Flores Course: CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Instructor: Dr.
User
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Abstract class representing a system user.
UserManager
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Manages all users in the system using HashMaps.
Venue
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Abstract class representing a venue where events take place.
VenueManager
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Manages all venues in the system.
